_comment: Order lifecycle. Placement: db row, single writer per order id (events serialize on the row lock). Consumes markPaid/markDeclined from the bus; publishes request via the entry action on Placed.

_ignores.ship: no-ship-without-capture: an unpaid order cannot ship

_ignores.markDeclined: stale settlement message; deduped by Payment.id
_ignores.cancel: cancellation after payment needs the refund flow, which this subsystem does not own
